title: Medical Coder
description: Mayo Clinic's Washington, DC location is seeking a Medical Coder to support our mission of providing comprehensive patient care. You'll translate clinical documentation into standardized medical codes, ensuring accurate billing and meaningful health data. This hybrid role allows you to work with our clinical team while maintaining flexibility. Join Mayo's legacy of excellence in healthcare.
responsibilities: Review patient medical records and clinical documentation to accurately assign ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS codes
Verify coding accuracy and compliance with coding guidelines and regulatory standards
Communicate with physicians and clinical staff regarding documentation deficiencies or clarifications needed
Maintain current knowledge of coding standards, payer guidelines, and regulatory changes
Audit coded records for accuracy and completeness, documenting findings and recommendations
Achieve departmental targets for productivity while maintaining accuracy standards of 98% or higher

requirements.education: Associate's degree in Health Information Management or Medical Coding; or High School diploma with completion of accredited medical coding program
skills: Proficiency with ICD-10, CPT, and HCPCS coding systems
Knowledge of medical terminology and anatomy
Ability to work independently and meet deadlines
certifications: RHIT (Registered Health Information Technician) or AAPC CPC (Certified Professional Coder) preferred
AHIMA or AAPC membership required within 6 months of hire

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Tuition reimbursement for certification maintenance and continuing education
Access to Mayo Clinic's employee health programs and wellness initiatives
